text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew! The tropical south is steaming hot! Time to
hit the waves and―

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Chiyo, what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Eep! Sorry, I just, um, you know... I-I didn't realize
how fancy the place would be!
So here we are at an upscale inn, complete with a private beach. As for how we got here... It all started just yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't believe how good the food is at my
relatives' inn down south!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I wish I could try some... I'd love to know
what your favorite dishes are!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Really? How about we swing by then?

And just like that, I end up chaperoning a luxury
getaway trip.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The gate leading in is huge, and the rooms are so
spacious and secluded... There's even an open-air
bath, a-and everything is so serene and just—I
can't believe my eyes!
Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Eek! S-sorry about that! I completely forgot about
eating breakfast...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's no problem at all. Can't run with no
gas in the tank. Let's go for some lunch!

text_block_list.name: Waiter
text_block_list.text:
This is a local specialty, steamed in our island's
traditional style. Please enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. All righty, let's dig in
before the food gets cold! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
T-time to dig in! Wow, I've never seen Japanese
cuisine like this before! Um... Where do I even
start?

As Sakura Chiyono O hesitates on what to eat,
Maruzensky casually removes a lid from one of
the bowls.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. I should probably start with the soup...
Huh? The lid won't come off.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that? If you hold the bowl down with your left
hand and give the lid a twist, it should pop right
off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: R-right! Thank you!
As we continue to eat our lunch...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, so rich and fatty! This fish really is the
bomb!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... Maruzen? Wh-what do I... do with the fish
bones?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're supposed to use the kaishi paper. It's like
a napkin—you put the bones inside to keep them
out of sight.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I-I see! So that's what this paper is for...

Maruzensky maintains impeccable manners as she
finishes her meal, leaving her plates spotless.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my aunt should be arriving soon. I'll dip out
for a second to say hi!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay! See you in a bit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen's plates sure are clean. Meanwhile, mine
are a complete mess...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: It's nothing to worry yourself about.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know, but... it's definitely a reminder that
Maruzen and I live in completely different worlds.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everything's so fancy, but she's completely at
home. She's so polite, and elegant, and...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Eep, what am I saying? Please don't tell her any
of that!

With how much Chiyono O looks up to
Maruzensky, it's making her feel out of place
around her. I wonder if there's anything I can do...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo seems down. Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you know anything?
choice_data_list: I think you're just imagining things!
She's a little worried about something...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you know anything?
choice_data_list: I think you're just imagining things!
She's a little worried about something...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Hm, maybe I'm just overthinking it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Um, sorry for keeping you two waiting. I'm done
changing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back, Chiyo! That reminds me, there's
something I wanted to tell you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
For tonight's dessert, they're making vanilla ice
cream blended with mixed berries.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And trust me—it gives the academy's steamed
carrot buns a run for their money! It's the real
bee's knees!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're saying this dessert... is on par with the
school's?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It is! Like, I'd be happy with just dinner, but
knowing there'll be an extra special treat with it
has me all revved up!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why we need to get running and work up a
big appetite!

Sakura Chiyono O blinks in disbelief before
breaking into laughter.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing... I agree. We've gotta make room
for dessert! Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Let's get to work! Some sweet waves are
starting to roll in!

It seems Maruzensky's frank, casual language has
worked away Sakura Chiyono O's worries.
The two run off towards the blue sea, all smiles.

I explain to Maruzensky how Sakura Chiyono O
had been comparing the two of them and ended
up a bit self-conscious about their differences.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You don't say... So that's how she's been feeling,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know just the thing... Let me switch up our
schedule real quick!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, is this supposed to be a... ninety-minute
all-you-can-eat dessert bar?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Sorry for being so last minute. I heard
they had limited-time cherry blossom-themed
sweets, so I really wanted to check it out with
you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Lookie here! There's petals floating inside the
jelly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're right! How cute!

The cute but sophisticated sweets on display
seem to be making Sakura Chiyono O's heart
flutter.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Cherry blossom mont blancs, cherry
blossom custard pudding, cherry blossom lattes...
It's all so lovely!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Oh Chiyo, you should see the smile on your
face right now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can't help it when everything's so
delicious! It's like... "Dessert is an Umamusume's
best friend!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I really want to try this one with you guys! I'll go
grab some!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Looks like she's back to her good old
self. What a relief.

Maruzensky gently smiles as she watches Sakura
skip over to the cakes.
